inline_comments.message: Why it has to be in liveness probe condition? Is it an env var?

it is passed as an argument to the mariadb docker "COMMAND" entry (similar to the entrypoint) to start the mysqld server.   So for example you should see the mariadb server running with that option (see below):

root@k8s:/dockerdata-nfs/oom# kubectl exec -it jhh-policydb-c98fdbcb9-mb6wk --container policydb -n oom bash
root@jhh-policydb-c98fdbcb9-mb6wk:/# ps -ef
UID        PID  PPID  C STIME TTY          TIME CMD
mysql        1     0  0 Apr16 ?        00:00:30 mysqld --lower-case-table-names=1
root       252     0  0 03:22 ?        00:00:00 bash
root       258   252  0 03:22 ?        00:00:00 ps -ef
But it should not be added inside the liveness if condition.
